options.text: I'll take two, please. I need extra for the meeting.
Why don't you order more? This isn't enough.
I don't need any. Just throw it away.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'That's perfect, I'll take one.' 体现了合作态度和对有限资源的接受，符合场景中‘灵活调整需求’的要求。选项1虽然语法正确，但要求超出库存，不够合作；选项3是抱怨，语气不恰当；选项4态度消极，不符合职场沟通规范。
content.speakerText: We've got plenty of pens and pads, but only one roll of tape left.
content.speakerTextCn: 笔和便签都够，但胶带只剩一卷了。

options.text: I'll take all five folders and find another place to buy staplers.
I want ten folders and a stapler right now.
Why do we even have folders? They're useless.
Can you just give me the stapler anyway?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了合理接受现有库存并主动寻找替代方案，符合职场合作精神。选项2要求超出库存且不合理；选项3消极否定，破坏团队氛围；选项4无视库存现实，强求不可能的物品。
content.speakerText: We have five folders left, but no staplers in stock.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们还剩五个文件夹，但订书机已经没货了。

options.text: I'll take five notepads and one marker — that should be enough.
I need all the markers and ten notepads — I'm the only one who uses them.
These are useless. Why don't we just switch to digital?
Can I have two markers even though you said there are only three?

content.explanation: 正确答案合理分配资源，尊重库存限制，语气合作。选项2自私且要求过多；选项3否定物品价值，不具建设性；选项4无视明确信息，强求额外资源���
content.speakerText: We have 20 notepads and three markers. The markers are almost out.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们有20个便签本和三个记号笔，记号笔快用完了。
